mapper.sql: id, title, intro, cover_url, link_url, sort_order, status, like_count, favorite_count, share_count, creator_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `resource_post` (title, intro, cover_url, link_url, sort_order, status, like_count, favorite_count, share_count, creator_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{title}, #{intro}, #{coverUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{shareCount}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update `resource_post` set title = #{title}, intro = #{intro}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update `resource_post` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `resource_post` set like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `resource_post` set favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `resource_post` set share_count = share_count + 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `resource_post` where status = 1 order by sort_order asc, id desc
select from `resource_post` order by sort_order asc, id desc
